rationale: Educ. Code §12.258 governs student eligibility for adult education charter programs. It contains no reference to property tax, homestead exemptions, or Tax Code §11.13. No conflict exists.
quote: A person who is at least 18 years of age and not more than 50 years of age is eligible to enroll in an adult education program operated under a charter granted under this subchapter
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
